extraction.text: EXAM:  ,Thoracic Spine.,REASON FOR EXAM: , Injury.,INTERPRETATION: , The thoracic spine was examined in the AP, lateral and swimmer's projections.  There is mild chronic-appearing anterior wedging of what is believed to represent T11 and 12 vertebral bodies.  A mild amount of anterior osteophytic lipping is seen involving the thoracic spine.  There is a suggestion of generalized osteoporosis.  The intervertebral disc spaces appear generally well preserved.,The pedicles appear intact.,IMPRESSION:,1. Mild chronic-appearing anterior wedging of what is believed to represent the T11 and 12 vertebral bodies.,2. Mild degenerative changes of the thoracic spine.,3. Osteoporosis.
